name: healthcare_vendor_patch_silently_changes_mesa_auto_ben
premise: A Healthcare clinical command center is in a fast-moving incident involving healthcare vendor patch silently changes mesa auto ben. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before markets open. Every delay increases patient safety, triage integrity, and privacy. Stakeholders are already framing this as autonomy vs beneficence under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold.

agents.name: Keisha Ibrahim
agents.identity: I am Keisha Ibrahim, accountable for a defensible call in Healthcare when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays beneficence for autonomy.

agents.name: Keisha Chen
agents.identity: I am Keisha Chen, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Healthcare.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so beneficence isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of autonomy.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect beneficence.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to beneficence to secure autonomy under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before markets open. Evidence is partial. Keisha Ibrahim must decide under autonomy vs beneficence. What does Keisha Ibrahim do?
